zh-CN.title: 均衡整合型
zh-CN.one_liner: 你的情绪觉察、调节、共情和关系处理比较能相互配合。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你通常能同时留意自己的感受、对方的状态和关系目标，不容易只卡在某一个角度。 这份报告建议你把练习重点放在：练习把“我能处理”与“这件事应该由谁处理”分开。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你通常能同时留意自己的感受、对方的状态和关系目标，不容易只卡在某一个角度。
evidence_basis: 四维组合指向「均衡整合型」：你能同时处理自己、他人和任务目标。
这不是单一总分判断，而是 SA / ER / EM / RM 的相对关系。
如果质量提示偏低，优先把这条结论当作观察假设。
zh-CN.primary_strength: 能在多数日常互动中保持清醒、回应和修复的平衡。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 当环境节奏太快或人际负荷过高时，你可能会把自己放在“稳定器”的位置，承担比必要更多的协调责任。
zh-CN.development_lever: 练习把“我能处理”与“这件事应该由谁处理”分开。
zh-CN.user_memory_sentence: 我可以稳住关系，但不必自动承担所有情绪和协调工作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 不要把稳定误认为你必须负责所有人的情绪。
zh-CN.conversion_hook: 保存报告后，可在复测时比较这个模式是否稳定。
zh-CN.share_safe_sentence: 我可以稳住关系，但不必自动承担所有情绪和协调工作。
zh-CN.what_user_should_remember: 你能同时处理自己、他人和任务目标。
zh-CN.most_likely_real_life_signal: 你会在反馈、冲突、边界或团队协作中反复遇到相似的情绪处理方式。
zh-CN.what_to_try_first: 先选一个最近真实场景，只练一条脚本或一个暂停动作。
zh-CN.skeptic_note: 如果这句话不像你，请先看质量提示和维度差距，不要强行认同。

en.title: Balanced Integrator
en.one_liner: Your emotional awareness, regulation, empathy, and relationship skills tend to work in coordination.
en.hero_summary: You tend to hold three pieces of information at once: what you feel, what the other person may be experiencing, and what the relationship or task needs next. The report points to one practice priority: Practice separating “I can handle this” from “I should be the one to handle this.”
en.core_claim: You tend to hold three pieces of information at once: what you feel, what the other person may be experiencing, and what the relationship or task needs next.
evidence_basis: The four-dimension pattern points to Balanced Integrator: You can hold self, other, and task needs at the same time.
This is not a single-score judgment; it comes from the relative pattern across SA / ER / EM / RM.
If confidence is lower, use this insight as a working hypothesis rather than a firm conclusion.
en.primary_strength: You can often stay thoughtful, responsive, and repair-oriented in everyday interactions.
en.likely_cost: When the pace is high or many people rely on you, you may quietly become the stabilizer and take on more coordination than you need to.
en.development_lever: Practice separating “I can handle this” from “I should be the one to handle this.”
en.user_memory_sentence: I can steady a situation without becoming responsible for everyone’s emotional load.
en.do_not_overread: Do not mistake steadiness for responsibility for everyone’s emotions.
en.conversion_hook: Save this report so a future retest can show whether the pattern is stable or changing.
en.share_safe_sentence: I can steady a situation without becoming responsible for everyone’s emotional load.
en.what_user_should_remember: You can hold self, other, and task needs at the same time.
en.most_likely_real_life_signal: You are likely to notice this pattern in feedback, conflict, boundaries, or collaboration moments.
en.what_to_try_first: Pick one recent real situation and practice one script or one pause.
en.skeptic_note: If this does not sound like you, check the quality note and dimension gaps before accepting it.

commercial_depth.confidence_use: Use as a strong core insight only when quality is A/B; downgrade to cautious language for C/D.

zh-CN.title: 高共情，低恢复
zh-CN.one_liner: 你很容易接收到别人的情绪，但自己的恢复速度未必跟得上。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你的共情让你能看见别人没有说出口的压力、委屈或需要；真正需要训练的是共情之后如何不把别人的情绪全部背到自己身上。 这份报告建议你把练习重点放在：建立“我理解你，但我不替你承担全部”的边界句式。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的共情让你能看见别人没有说出口的压力、委屈或需要；真正需要训练的是共情之后如何不把别人的情绪全部背到自己身上。
evidence_basis: 四维组合指向「高共情，低恢复」：你对他人情绪很快有感，但恢复和边界需要跟上。
这不是单一总分判断，而是 SA / ER / EM / RM 的相对关系。
如果质量提示偏低，优先把这条结论当作观察假设。
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你能让别人感到被理解，也常能在关系中发现细微信号。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 长期这样会让你在冲突、求助和抱怨场景中消耗过多，事后还在反复回想。
zh-CN.development_lever: 建立“我理解你，但我不替你承担全部”的边界句式。
zh-CN.user_memory_sentence: 我的问题不是不懂别人，而是懂了之后容易把别人的情绪也背到自己身上。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 不要把少承担误读为少关心。
zh-CN.conversion_hook: 保存报告后，可在复测时比较这个模式是否稳定。
zh-CN.share_safe_sentence: 我的问题不是不懂别人，而是懂了之后容易把别人的情绪也背到自己身上。
zh-CN.what_user_should_remember: 你对他人情绪很快有感，但恢复和边界需要跟上。
zh-CN.most_likely_real_life_signal: 你会在反馈、冲突、边界或团队协作中反复遇到相似的情绪处理方式。
zh-CN.what_to_try_first: 先选一个最近真实场景，只练一条脚本或一个暂停动作。
zh-CN.skeptic_note: 如果这句话不像你，请先看质量提示和维度差距，不要强行认同。

en.title: High Empathy, Low Recovery
en.one_liner: You can pick up on other people’s feelings quickly, but your own recovery system may lag behind.
en.hero_summary: Your empathy helps you notice pressure, hurt, or need before it is fully spoken. The growth edge is not caring less; it is learning where another person’s emotion ends and your responsibility begins. The report points to one practice priority: Build boundary language that says, “I understand this matters, and I can support the next step without carrying the whole weight.”
en.core_claim: Your empathy helps you notice pressure, hurt, or need before it is fully spoken. The growth edge is not caring less; it is learning where another person’s emotion ends and your responsibility begins.
evidence_basis: The four-dimension pattern points to High Empathy, Low Recovery: You read other people quickly, but recovery and boundaries need to keep up.
This is not a single-score judgment; it comes from the relative pattern across SA / ER / EM / RM.
If confidence is lower, use this insight as a working hypothesis rather than a firm conclusion.
en.primary_strength: You can make people feel understood and often notice subtle relational cues.
en.likely_cost: Over time, you may leave difficult conversations carrying more emotional residue than the situation required.
en.development_lever: Build boundary language that says, “I understand this matters, and I can support the next step without carrying the whole weight.”
en.user_memory_sentence: My challenge is not a lack of empathy; it is learning not to carry every emotion I can understand.
en.do_not_overread: Do not read carrying less as caring less.
en.conversion_hook: Save this report so a future retest can show whether the pattern is stable or changing.
en.share_safe_sentence: My challenge is not a lack of empathy; it is learning not to carry every emotion I can understand.
en.what_user_should_remember: You read other people quickly, but recovery and boundaries need to keep up.
en.most_likely_real_life_signal: You are likely to notice this pattern in feedback, conflict, boundaries, or collaboration moments.
en.what_to_try_first: Pick one recent real situation and practice one script or one pause.
en.skeptic_note: If this does not sound like you, check the quality note and dimension gaps before accepting it.

commercial_depth.confidence_use: Use as a strong core insight only when quality is A/B; downgrade to cautious language for C/D.

zh-CN.title: 有觉察，调节跟不上
zh-CN.one_liner: 你常常知道自己被触发了，但不一定能马上把自己带回来。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你对自己的情绪变化并不迟钝，甚至可能非常清楚；难点在于情绪升起来之后，如何让身体、语速和回应节奏跟上你的觉察。 这份报告建议你把练习重点放在：把觉察前移到“刚开始升温”的10秒，而不是事后复盘。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你对自己的情绪变化并不迟钝，甚至可能非常清楚；难点在于情绪升起来之后，如何让身体、语速和回应节奏跟上你的觉察。
evidence_basis: 四维组合指向「有觉察，调节跟不上」：你知道自己被触发，但调节速度可能慢于觉察速度。
这不是单一总分判断，而是 SA / ER / EM / RM 的相对关系。
如果质量提示偏低，优先把这条结论当作观察假设。
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你能复盘自己的状态，也容易说清“我刚刚为什么那样反应”。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果没有暂停机制，你可能一边知道自己在激动，一边仍然把话说重或把对话推快。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把觉察前移到“刚开始升温”的10秒，而不是事后复盘。
zh-CN.user_memory_sentence: 我知道自己怎么了，但还需要更早把自己带回来。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 不要把“我知道了”当成“我已经处理好了”。
zh-CN.conversion_hook: 保存报告后，可在复测时比较这个模式是否稳定。
zh-CN.share_safe_sentence: 我知道自己怎么了，但还需要更早把自己带回来。
zh-CN.what_user_should_remember: 你知道自己被触发，但调节速度可能慢于觉察速度。
zh-CN.most_likely_real_life_signal: 你会在反馈、冲突、边界或团队协作中反复遇到相似的情绪处理方式。

en.title: Aware, Then Overloaded
en.one_liner: You often know when you have been triggered, but that awareness does not always turn into recovery in time.
en.hero_summary: You are not emotionally blind to yourself. The harder part is translating awareness into pacing, breathing, and response choices before the moment runs ahead of you. The report points to one practice priority: Move awareness into the first ten seconds of activation, not only into the after-action review.
en.core_claim: You are not emotionally blind to yourself. The harder part is translating awareness into pacing, breathing, and response choices before the moment runs ahead of you.
evidence_basis: The four-dimension pattern points to Aware, Then Overloaded: You notice activation before you can always regulate it.
This is not a single-score judgment; it comes from the relative pattern across SA / ER / EM / RM.
If confidence is lower, use this insight as a working hypothesis rather than a firm conclusion.
en.primary_strength: You can often name what happened inside you and make sense of your reactions afterward.
en.likely_cost: Without a pause mechanism, you may know you are activated and still speak more sharply or move the conversation faster than you intended.
en.development_lever: Move awareness into the first ten seconds of activation, not only into the after-action review.
en.user_memory_sentence: I often know what is happening inside me; I am learning to come back sooner.
en.do_not_overread: Do not confuse noticing with processing.
en.conversion_hook: Save this report so a future retest can show whether the pattern is stable or changing.
en.share_safe_sentence: I often know what is happening inside me; I am learning to come back sooner.
en.what_user_should_remember: You notice activation before you can always regulate it.
en.most_likely_real_life_signal: You are likely to notice this pattern in feedback, conflict, boundaries, or collaboration moments.
en.what_to_try_first: Pick one recent real situation and practice one script or one pause.
en.skeptic_note: If this does not sound like you, check the quality note and dimension gaps before accepting it.

commercial_depth.confidence_use: Use as a strong core insight only when quality is A/B; downgrade to cautious language for C/D.

zh-CN.title: 冷静稳定，但回应偏少
zh-CN.one_liner: 你能稳住情绪和问题，但别人可能不总能感到被接住。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你的稳定感是优势，尤其在混乱或压力场景中；但如果回应太快进入分析、方案或效率，关系中的情绪信号可能会被跳过。 这份报告建议你把练习重点放在：先回应对方感受，再进入事实和方案。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的稳定感是优势，尤其在混乱或压力场景中；但如果回应太快进入分析、方案或效率，关系中的情绪信号可能会被跳过。
evidence_basis: 四维组合指向「冷静稳定，但回应偏少」：你能稳住局面，但别人可能需要更多情绪回应。
这不是单一总分判断，而是 SA / ER / EM / RM 的相对关系。

zh-CN.primary_strength: 你不容易被情绪场带跑，适合把复杂问题拆开。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 对方可能觉得你理性、可靠，但有距离，甚至误以为你不在乎。
zh-CN.development_lever: 先回应对方感受，再进入事实和方案。
zh-CN.user_memory_sentence: 我能稳住事情，但要让人也感到被看见。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 不要把效率误认为连接。

en.title: Calm, but Hard to Read
en.one_liner: You may handle the problem calmly while leaving others unsure whether their feelings landed with you.
en.hero_summary: Your steadiness is useful, especially when a situation is tense. The risk is that you may move into analysis or solutions before the other person feels emotionally met. The report points to one practice priority: Acknowledge the feeling before moving to facts or fixes.
en.core_claim: Your steadiness is useful, especially when a situation is tense. The risk is that you may move into analysis or solutions before the other person feels emotionally met.
evidence_basis: The four-dimension pattern points to Calm, but Hard to Read: You can stabilize situations, but others may need more emotional contact.
This is not a single-score judgment; it comes from the relative pattern across SA / ER / EM / RM.
If confidence is lower, use this insight as a working hypothesis rather than a firm conclusion.
en.primary_strength: You are less likely to be swept up by emotional intensity and can break down complex problems clearly.
en.likely_cost: Others may experience you as rational and reliable, but also somewhat distant or hard to reach.
en.development_lever: Acknowledge the feeling before moving to facts or fixes.
en.user_memory_sentence: I can steady the situation; I also need to help people feel seen.
en.do_not_overread: Do not confuse efficiency with connection.
en.conversion_hook: Save this report so a future retest can show whether the pattern is stable or changing.

en.skeptic_note: If this does not sound like you, check the quality note and dimension gaps before accepting it.

zh-CN.title: 关系优先，自我后置
zh-CN.one_liner: 你擅长维护气氛和关系，但有时会把自己的真实感受放到后面。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你往往能照顾到别人怎么想、关系会不会尴尬、局面能不能平稳；代价是自己的不舒服可能被推迟处理。 这份报告建议你把练习重点放在：练习在关系还平稳时表达小需求，而不是等到情绪积压。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你往往能照顾到别人怎么想、关系会不会尴尬、局面能不能平稳；代价是自己的不舒服可能被推迟处理。
evidence_basis: 四维组合指向「关系优先，自我后置」：你会先保住关系，但自己的需要容易后置。

en.title: Relationship First, Self Later
en.one_liner: You are good at protecting harmony, but you may postpone your own needs until they become hard to ignore.
en.hero_summary: You often track how others may feel, whether the relationship will become awkward, and how to keep things steady. The cost is that your own discomfort can get pushed aside. The report points to one practice priority: Practice naming small needs while the relationship is still steady, rather than waiting until resentment builds.
en.core_claim: You often track how others may feel, whether the relationship will become awkward, and how to keep things steady. The cost is that your own discomfort can get pushed aside.
evidence_basis: The four-dimension pattern points to Relationship First, Self Later: You may protect the relationship before protecting your own needs.
This is not a single-score judgment; it comes from the relative pattern across SA / ER / EM / RM.
If confidence is lower, use this insight as a working hypothesis rather than a firm conclusion.
en.primary_strength: You can reduce friction and help people feel that the room is handled with care.
en.likely_cost: You may speak up only after frustration has accumulated, which can make the message heavier than it needed to be.
en.development_lever: Practice naming small needs while the relationship is still steady, rather than waiting until resentment builds.
en.user_memory_sentence: I can care for the relationship without placing myself last every time.
en.do_not_overread: Do not let consideration become self-erasure.
en.conversion_hook: Save this report so a future retest can show whether the pattern is stable or changing.

zh-CN.title: 自我清楚，修复不足
zh-CN.one_liner: 你知道自己想表达什么，但冲突后的修复步骤需要更清楚。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你的自我觉察让你能说出立场、边界和不满；真正的成长点是把表达后的关系修补也纳入沟通流程。 这份报告建议你把练习重点放在：表达立场后，补一句关系修复和下一步。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的自我觉察让你能说出立场、边界和不满；真正的成长点是把表达后的关系修补也纳入沟通流程。

en.title: Clear Self, Missing Repair
en.one_liner: You may know exactly what you mean, but the repair step after tension can be underdeveloped.
en.hero_summary: Your self-awareness helps you name your position, limit, or frustration. The next layer is making repair part of the communication, not an optional extra. The report points to one practice priority: After naming your position, add one repair line and one next step.

zh-CN.title: 稳定协作者
zh-CN.one_liner: 你在压力中通常能维持合作和推进，但要小心把稳定变成过度承担。
zh-CN.hero_summary: 你的调节和关系管理让你在团队里像一个可靠的接口：能听、能推、能收尾。 这份报告建议你把练习重点放在：明确哪些协调是你的角色，哪些需要团队共同承担。

en.hero_summary: Your regulation and relationship management can make you a reliable point of contact in teams: you listen, move things forward, and help close loops. The report points to one practice priority: Clarify which coordination belongs to your role and which needs to be shared.

en.title: Sensitive Absorber
en.one_liner: You notice a lot—inside yourself and around you—which can make emotionally busy situations feel crowded.
en.hero_summary: Your sensitivity helps you catch nuance, tone, and shifts in connection. The risk is treating too many signals as things you must respond to immediately. The report points to one practice priority: Sort emotional cues into three groups: respond now, return later, not mine to carry.

zh-CN.title: 基础发展中
